ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal (if applicable) */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (if applicable) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the publication */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the publication was added to the system */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the publication was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_publications" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_topics" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the publication */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the keyword */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the keyword was added to the publication */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the keyword was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
column_names: Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper)
Date the publication was added to the system
Date the publication was last modified
Date the author record was created
Date the author record was last updated
Order of the author in the publication
Date the topic was last updated
Weight or importance of the keyword
Date the keyword was added to the publication
Date the keyword was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Date the user account was created
Date the user account was last updated
Date of the user's last login
Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the publication being accessed
ID of the user accessing the publication
Date when the publication was accessed
IP address of the user accessing the publication
User agent string of the device used to access the publication
Date the access log was created
